hooks.command: repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || repo=$PWD; if [ -x "$repo/bin/setup-dev-env.sh" ]; then "$repo/bin/setup-dev-env.sh" || echo "shipit: setup-dev-env.sh reported a problem — continuing (base-system provisioning is best-effort)." >&2; fi; test -x "$repo/bin/shipit" || { echo "shipit: bin/shipit launcher not present or executable here — skipping this managed hook (run 'shipit install' to (re)provision it)."; exit 0; }; python -c 'import json, os; print(json.dumps({"cwd": os.getcwd()}))' | "$repo/bin/shipit" hook sessionstart; : "shipit hook sessionstart"
